revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-975

A wave which is propagated along the boundary between two media in a manner determined by the properties of the two media in the vicinity of the boundary.


{{IALAFooter}}
